name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue bag features an elegant design, elevating the style of this classic series. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, the rounded flap has a refined curve and is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain featuring alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers ample space and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody carry.
name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne Avenue bag features an elegant design, elevating the style of this classic series. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, the rounded flap has a refined curve and is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain featuring alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers ample space and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody carry.
Dimensions: 22.5 x 12.5 x 6.5
0322
